fields.name: accessible
fields.description: Whether the thesis is publicly accessible (true) or not (false)

fields.name: cas
fields.description: System used to publish the thesis record

fields.name: embargo
fields.description: Embargo date if applicable. Not available for theses gathered using the API.

fields.name: phd_by_publication
fields.description: true if the doctorate is a thesis by published works, false otherwise. Not available for theses gathered using the API.

fields.name: from_api
fields.description: true if the thesis has been gathered from the Thèses.fr API, false if it is from the 2023 bulk export
